instruction: Write a FreeMarker template that lists only active users from a `users` sequence. Each user map has `name` and boolean `active`. Skip inactive users inside the list loop. Escape names. Show a message when no active users remain.
code:
<#-- Model: users: sequence of maps { name, active } --> <#assign activeUsers = users![]>
    <#assign rendered = 0> <#list activeUsers as user> <#if user.active!false> <#assign rendered = rendered + 1>
  • ${user.name?html}
<#if rendered == 0>

No active users found.
